bearPost.title: Bear Post / Note
bearPost.description: Represents either a public platform post (with caption, image, emoji reactions) or a private note owned strictly by a user.

userId.description: UID of the owner linked to Firebase Authentication.

userDisplayName.description: Public name of the user who drafted the bear post.

userPhotoURL.description: Public profile picture / bear avatar representing the author.

caption.description: Markdown or clear text caption content of this post or private note.

imageUrl.description: The custom image URL or select pre-configured bear photo representing this entry.

isPublic.description: True if the item is displayed on the public reddit-like homepage feed. False if kept privately as notes.

reactions.description: A map listing selected emojis paired to lists of user UIDs who reacted with that emoji (e.g., {'🐻': ['uid1', 'uid2']}).

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the post was first created.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the post was last modified.

bear_posts/{postId}.description: Curated collection of public bear posts and private bear work notes, secured with granular Attribute-Based Access Control rules.
